features: 【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL】- These nail brushes' handles are made of sturdy plastic which are not easy to bent. The bristles are made of flexible plastic, not too hard and not too soft which won't scratch your skin. Durable for long-term to use.

【PRACTICAL HANDLE】- Ergonomic handle provides a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. much easier to hold and convenient to use, and when not in use, it can be hung up for easy storage.
【USAGE】- Our Brushes can also b eused in home, office, kitchen, bathroom, garden shed sink, travel etc.Very convenient.

【LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO CARRY】- The nail scrub brushes are small and lightweight, will not take up much space, easy to take and store, you also can put it in your travel bag or handbag when you travel or on a business trip if you need.

【FUNCTIONS】- Use Our Nail Brush as part of your regular manicure routine to keep hands clean and well-groomed. These Nail brushes can be used to clean small parts such as nail seams, fruits, pet nails, nails, dirt underneath nails. Perfect Scrubber Cleaner for Fingernail Manicure, Toenail Pedicure for both personal use at home and professional use in salons or spas.
description: Product Description Daily Hygiene, Refined. Achieve a deeper clean for your hands and nails. Our ergonomic nail brush is designed to gently yet effectively remove dirt from under nails, promoting personal hygiene with a tool that feels as good as it works. Your Partner in Daily Cleanliness Comfortable & Secure Grip The compact, rounded handle fits perfectly in your palm, providing control and comfort during use, even with wet, soapy hands. Gentle Yet Firm Bristles The white bristles offer the perfect balance of softness and resilience to clean thoroughly without scratching nails or surrounding skin. Ideal for: Gardeners, mechanics, artists, and anyone who works with their hands. Helps remove stubborn dirt and grime from under nails. Hygiene On The Go Its small, lightweight design makes it ideal for keeping in your washbag, gym kit, or at the office for clean nails anytime, anywhere. For Work & Travel Durable & Easy to Clean Crafted from sturdy plastic, this brush is easy to rinse clean and dries quickly, maintaining its hygiene and appearance over time. Ideal for:chefs, beauticians, and frequent travelers.
